revision.comment: Avoid [[:Category:Pages where archive parameter is not a subpage]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Archives]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Archives]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects A
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Archives]] <noinclude></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Archives here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{talk other|||demospace={{{demospace|}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{banner|{{{large}}}}}}|yes | {{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|none|| }} | }} {{#ifeq:{{{search}}}|no|| }}{{#if:{{{age|}}}{{{archive_age|}}}{{{target|}}}{{Th/abp|bot|{{{root|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|cfg={{{cfg|1}}}}}| {{#ifeq:{{#if:{{{auto|}}}|auto|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|no|¬}}}}-{{{editbox|yes}}}|no-yes |{{#ifexist:{{#rel2abs:{{{archivelist|./archivelist}}}}}|}} }}
{{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|alt=Archiving icon|image={{{image|Replacement filing cabinet.svg}}}|size={{{image-size|}}}|sizedefault=40px}}
{{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|none||{{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|alt=Archiving icon|image={{{image|Replacement filing cabinet.svg}}}|size={{{image-size|}}}|sizedefault=40px}}
}}{{{title|Archives}}}
{{#ifeq:{{{banner|{{{large}}}}}}|yes|{{{title|Archives}}}: }}{{#switch:{{#if:{{{list|}}}|no|{{{auto|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|no}}}}}}} |#default={{#ifeq:{{{index|}}}|none||{{#ifexist:{{#rel2abs:./{{{index|Archive index}}}}}|[[{{#rel2abs:./{{{index|Archive index}}}}}|Index]] |{{#ifexist:User:ClueBot III/Master Detailed Indices/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|[[User:ClueBot III/Master Detailed Indices/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Index]] }}}} }}{{#ifexist:{{#rel2abs:{{#if:{{{archivelist|}}}|{{{archivelist}}}|./archivelist}}}} |
{{ {{#rel2abs:{{{archivelist|./archivelist}}}}} }}
|{{Archive list |{{#if:{{{root|}}}|root|DISABLE1}}={{{root}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{banner|{{{large}}}}}}|yes|DISABLE2|auto}}={{{auto|long}}} |nobr={{#ifeq:{{{banner|{{{large}}}}}}|yes|yes|no}} |{{#if:{{{prefix|}}}|prefix|DISABLE3}}={{{prefix|}}} |{{#if:{{{start|}}}|start|DISABLE4}}={{{start|}}} }} }} |no=}}{{#if:{{{list|{{{1|}}}}}} |
{{{list|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
{{#tag:inputbox| bgcolor=transparent type=fulltext prefix={{if empty|{{{searchprefix|}}}|{{{root|}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}/}} break={{#ifeq:{{{banner|{{{large}}}}}}|yes|{{{search-break|no}}}|{{{search-break|yes}}}}} width={{#ifeq:{{{banner|{{{large}}}}}}|yes||{{#if:{{{search-width|}}}|{{{search-width}}}|22}}}} searchbuttonlabel={{{search-button-label|{{{button-label|Search archives}}}}}} }}
{{#if: {{{nobot|}}}|| ---- {{#if:{{{target|}}}{{Th/abp|bot|{{{root|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|cfg={{{cfg|1}}}}}|This page has {{#if: {{{target|}}} |'''[[{{#rel2abs:{{{target}}}}}|archives]]'''. |archives. }}{{#if: {{Th/abp|bot|{{{root|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|cfg={{{cfg|1}}}}} |Sections {{#if: {{Th/abp|age|{{{root|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|cfg={{{cfg|1}}}}} | older than '''{{Th/abp|age|{{{root|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|cfg={{{cfg|1}}}|r=y}} {{Th/abp|units|{{{root|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|cfg={{{cfg|1}}}|r=y}}''' }} may be automatically archived by [[User:{{Th/abp|bot|{{{root|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|cfg={{{cfg|1}}}}}|{{Th/abp|bot|{{{root|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|cfg={{{cfg|1}}}}}]]{{#ifexpr: {{Th/abp|min|{{{root|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|cfg={{{cfg|1}}}}} | when more than {{Th/abp|min|{{{root|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|cfg={{{cfg|1}}}}} section{{#ifexpr: {{Th/abp|min|{{{root|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|cfg={{{cfg|1}}}}}-1 |s are | is}} present}}.}}}} }}}}
[{{fullurl:{{#rel2abs:{{{archivelist|./archivelist}}}}}|action=edit&preload=Template:Archives/Preload}} Edit this box]
{{User:MiszaBot/config |archive = Template:Archives/ |counter = 3 |minthreadsleft = 4 |minthreadstoarchive = 2 |algo = old(90d) }}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
